waiver.reason_summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
waiver.detail: Detached HEAD pre-push gate on d15633136 exposed only pre-existing baseline failures unrelated to this release tree: ansible-lint fatal violations in untouched Ansible files and Trivy DS-0002 findings in untouched Dockerfiles; local substitute checks on the same commit stayed green.
substitute_evidence: exact schema-validation chain passed locally on HEAD@d15633136
